E37 — GenEval counting: baseline vs mag_top25

SD3.5-medium, n=1, 512px, w=4.5 · velocity spectral normalization (mag→cfg1) · torchvision-detector GenEval variant. counting accuracy: baseline 0.537 → mag_top25 0.550. Of 80 prompts: 3 mag_top25 fixes a baseline miss, 2 regressions. Sorted wins-first. Each cell: image, ✓/✗, and the scorer's reason (e.g. "found 1" = detected count).
